name: the-science-of-storytelling
description: Will Storr's The Science of Storytelling — a narrative writing and cognitive science toolkit exploring why stories affect us so deeply and how to craft compelling narratives using neuroscience, character development, and attention control.
useCase: Understand the science behind storytelling — learn how to craft narratives that engage, persuade, and create meaning.
knownRisks: Some neuroscience claims are simplified for a general audience
The book focuses on narrative fiction — business storytellers may need to adapt the principles
The 'controlling consciousness' concept may not apply to all narrative forms
